title: Winter Robins LED Gel Candle
features: Charming LED light that activates when lit
description: Illuminate your holiday season with this stunningly gorgeous Winter Robins LED Gel Candle. This very unique candle features a charming LED light that activates when lit, creating a warm and inviting glow that enhances your holiday décor. Creating a warm and cosy ambience in any room of the house, it is stunning to look at and is the perfect Christmas gift.
